zickle

load

gunfolds.tools.zickle.load(filename)[source]

Loads a compressed object from disk

Parameters

filename (string) – name of the file

save

gunfolds.tools.zickle.save(object, filename, protocol=- 1)[source]

Save an object to a compressed disk file. Works well with huge objects.

Parameters

  • object – object to be saved as a zickle file

  • filename (string) – name of the file
